text:
あら、アンタ。
せっかく地球に行けるようになったのに
ろくに探索してないんじゃないの？

そんなんじゃ
他のアークスに先を越されて
へっぽこぴーに逆戻りよ？

やっぱり、私が
ちゃーんと見ててあげないと
ダメみたいね。

ウォーミングアップがてら
地球の東京エリア！
ちゃちゃっと行って

Oh, you. You have this whole planet Earth to
explore, but you've barely even started.
What's taking you so long?

Keep this up and the other ARKS operatives
will have surpassed you by the time you've
tied those massive clown shoes of yours.

You're just lucky you have me to point you in
the right direction.

Now warm up and get over to Earth's Tokyo
area, pronto! Get your rear in gear, you fool!
